title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Shree Cement

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Production Engineer at Shree Cement
jsonLd.description:
We at Shree Cement are looking for an experienced Production Engineer based out of Nashik. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Shree Cement:
Shree Cement is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and supervise shop floor workers and supervisors
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods
• Coordinate with design and engineering teams on product improvements
• Ensure compliance with safety regulations and factory acts
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Manage raw material procurement and inventory levels

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Root Cause Analysis
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in PPAP
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP
• Proficiency in 5S
• Proficiency in Lean Manufacturing
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in FMEA

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Shree Cement!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
